urdu transliteration text:
Ya Zainab e Kubra, Ya Zainab e KubraO Zainab e Kubra, O Zainab e KubraEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

english translation text:
WE ARE SURROUNDED BY TRIALS AND TRIBULATION
WE ARE YOUR AZADAR,
MAY WE GET GRANTED, FOR THE SAKE OF SHABBIR (a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
HAIN JITNEY BHI BEEMAR ATA SAB KO SHIFA HO JO BHI HO GIRAFTARE MASAEEB WOH RIHA HO HUM SAB KO ZIYARAT KE LIYE SHAAM BULANA
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
MAY THOSE WHO ARE ILL GET CURED,
MAY THOSE WHO ARE AFFLICTED WITH GRIEF, BE FREE OF THEIR GRIEF,
CALL US ALL TO THE ZIYARAT OF SHAAM!

urdu transliteration text:
JO GODIYAN MEHROOM HAI AWLAAD SE BIBI HON SAAHIBE AWLAAD BHAREN GODIYAN SAB KI HO IN KO ATA ASGHAR E BESHEER KA SADQA
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THOSE WHO ARE NOT BLESSED WITH CHILDREN, O BIBI, MAY ALL THESE FAMILIES BECOME BLESSED WITH CHILDREN,
MAY THEY BE GRANTED CHILDREN FOR THE SAKE OF ALI ASGHER

urdu transliteration text:
ZAAHIR HO JO DUNYA ME RAZA HUJJATE AAKHIR TAYAR HON HUM NUSRATE ISLAM KI KHATIR HAATHON ME ALAM LAB PE HO LABBAYK KA NARA
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
AS THE AWAITED ONE (atfs) REAPPEARS, WE SHALL BE READY FOR THE SAKE OF ISLAM,
WITH AN ‘ALAM’(FLAG) IN OUR HANDS AND LABBAYK ON OUR LIPS (AND HEARTS)
